info.name: Same Day Solution — POS Partner API.
info.description:
Enterprise POS Transaction API for B2B Partners.

Powered by **Same Day Solution Pvt. Ltd.**

This single collection works for every partner. You see only the POS machines assigned to your account and their transactions — no separate setup per company.

## Authentication
Every authenticated request requires 3 headers:
- `x-api-key` — Your public API key
- `x-signature` — HMAC-SHA256 signature
- `x-timestamp` — Current Unix timestamp (ms)

Signature formula:
```
HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, JSON.stringify(body) + timestamp)
```
For GET requests (no body): `HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, '' + timestamp)`

## Setup
1. Set `api_key` and `api_secret` in Collection Variables
2. Pre-request scripts auto-generate signature
3. All requests are ready to fire

## Security
- IP Whitelisting enforced (contact admin)
- Timestamp tolerance: 5 minutes
- HTTPS required in production
- Rate limited: 100 req/min

## ⚠️ Postman Cloud Agent
If you get **"IP address not authorized"** even though your IP is whitelisted, your request is likely being routed through Postman's cloud servers.

**Fix:** In Postman, go to **Settings → General** and turn **OFF** the option **"Send requests through Postman's cloud agent"** (or use the Postman Desktop Agent). This ensures requests are sent directly from your machine using your real IP address.

variable.description: Auto-saved from export job creation. Used by 'Check Export Status' request.

request.description:
Check if the POS Partner API is running.

No authentication needed.

**Expected Response:**
```json
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "service": "pos-partner-api",
  "timestamp": "2026-02-17T10:00:00.000Z",
  "database": { "status": "healthy" }
}
```

item.name: 🔐 Partner Authenticated
item.description:
All requests require `x-api-key`, `x-signature`, and `x-timestamp` headers.

The pre-request script automatically calculates the HMAC signature.

header.description: Your public API key (auto-set by pre-request script)
Unix timestamp in ms (auto-set by pre-request script)

request.description:
Retrieve POS transactions for your assigned terminals.

### Request Body Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `date_from` | ISO 8601 | ✅ Yes | Start date (max 90 days range) |
| `date_to` | ISO 8601 | ✅ Yes | End date |
| `status` | String | No | `AUTHORIZED`, `CAPTURED`, `FAILED`, `REFUNDED`, `VOIDED` |
| `terminal_id` | String | No | Filter by TID |
| `payment_mode` | String | No | `CARD`, `UPI`, `NFC`, `CASH`, `WALLET`, `NETBANKING`, `BHARATQR` |
| `page` | Integer | No | Page number (default: 1) |
| `page_size` | Integer | No | Records per page (default: 50, max: 100) |

### Authentication Headers
| Header | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `x-api-key` | Your public API key |
| `x-signature` | `HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, JSON.stringify(body) + timestamp)` |
| `x-timestamp` | Current Unix timestamp in milliseconds |

### Response Fields (per transaction)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Internal transaction ID |
| `razorpay_txn_id` | String | Razorpay transaction ID |
| `external_ref` | String | External reference number |
| `terminal_id` | String | Terminal ID (TID) |
| `amount` | String | Amount in rupees (e.g. `49897.00`) |
| `status` | String | `AUTHORIZED`, `CAPTURED`, `FAILED`, `REFUNDED`, `VOIDED` |
| `rrn` | String | Retrieval Reference Number |
| `card_brand` | String | `VISA`, `MasterCard`, `RUPAY`, `Diners Club`, `Amex` |
| `card_type` | String | `CREDIT`, `DEBIT` |
| `card_number` | String | Masked card number (e.g. `4862-69XX-XXXX-3667`) |
| `issuing_bank` | String | Card issuing bank (e.g. `HDFC`, `SBI`, `AXIS`) |
| `card_classification` | String | Card tier/classification. Values: `PLATINUM`, `GOLD`, `STANDARD`, `CLASSIC`, `SIGNATURE`, `BUSINESS`, `TITANIUM`, `INFINITE`, `CORPORATE`, `PREPAID`, `ELECTRON`, `MPL`, `MPG`, `MPL - Platinum`, `Mastercard World`, `Visa Class`, `WORLD CARD`, `WORLD FOR`, `Rewards`, `Select`, `ANY`, `Fpaydefaul`, `NULL`. May be `null` if not available. |
| `card_txn_type` | String | Card entry mode. Values: `EMV with PIN`, `Contactless`, `Swipe`, `EMV`, `Manual Entry`, etc. May be `null` for UPI. |
| `acquiring_bank` | String | Acquiring bank. Values: `HDFC`, `AMEX`, `SBI`, `ICICI`, etc. |
| `payment_mode` | String | `CARD`, `UPI`, `NFC`, `CASH`, etc. |
| `device_serial` | String | POS device serial number |
| `customer_name` | String | Consumer/cardholder name |
| `payer_name` | String | Payer name |
| `txn_type` | String | Transaction type (e.g. `CHARGE`) |
| `auth_code` | String | Authorization code from card issuer |
| `mid` | String | Merchant ID (e.g. `IDZ551`) |
| `currency` | String | Currency code (e.g. `INR`) |
| `receipt_url` | String | Customer receipt URL |
| `posting_date` | String | Posting date (ISO 8601) |
| `txn_time` | String | Transaction time (ISO 8601) |
| `created_at` | String | Record creation time (ISO 8601) |

header.description: Your public API key (auto-set by pre-request script)
Unix timestamp in ms (auto-set by pre-request script)

query.description: Filter by status: active, inactive, maintenance, decommissioned
Filter by machine model (e.g., Razorpay POS)

request.description:
Retrieve POS machines assigned to your partner account.

### Query Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `page` | Integer | No | Page number (default: 1) |
| `limit` | Integer | No | Records per page (default: 50, max: 100) |
| `status` | String | No | Filter by status: `active`, `inactive`, `maintenance`, `decommissioned` |
| `machine_type` | String | No | Filter by machine model (e.g., `Razorpay POS`) |
| `search` | String | No | Search by terminal_id, device_serial, machine_model |

### Authentication Headers
| Header | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `x-api-key` | Your public API key |
| `x-signature` | `HMAC_SHA256(api_secret, '' + timestamp)` (empty body for GET) |
| `x-timestamp` | Current Unix timestamp in milliseconds |

### Response Fields
Each machine object includes:
- `id`: Unique machine UUID
- `terminal_id`: Razorpay Terminal ID (TID)
- `device_serial`: Physical device serial number
- `machine_model`: Machine model/type
- `status`: Operational status (`active`, `inactive`, `maintenance`, `decommissioned`)
- `activated_at`: When the machine was activated
- `last_txn_at`: Timestamp of last transaction
- `retailer_code`: Assigned retailer code
- `retailer_name`: Assigned retailer name
- `retailer_business_name`: Retailer business name
- `retailer_city`, `retailer_state`: Retailer location

console.log('✓ Export job created. job_id saved:', json.data.job_id);

request.description:
Create an async export job in CSV format.

### Supported Formats
| Format | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `csv` | Comma-separated values |
| `excel` | Microsoft Excel (.xlsx) |
| `pdf` | PDF report |
| `zip` | ZIP archive with CSV + PDF |

### Export Fields
All exported files include all transaction fields, including:
- `card_classification` - Card tier/classification (PLATINUM, GOLD, SIGNATURE, etc.)
- `card_txn_type` - Card entry mode (EMV with PIN, Contactless, Swipe, etc.)
- `acquiring_bank` - Acquiring bank (HDFC, AMEX, SBI, etc.)
- All other transaction fields as documented in the Get POS Transactions endpoint

### Daily Limit
Default: 10 exports/day. Contact admin to increase.

### Response
Returns a `job_id` — use it in the Export Status endpoint to check progress.

response.name: 202 — Export Job Created
400 — Daily Export Limit Exceeded

Steps:
1. First, run "Create Export Job — CSV" (or Excel/ZIP)
2. The job_id will be automatically saved to last_export_job_id variable
3. Then run this request to check status

Or manually set last_export_job_id in Collection Variables');
// Validate UUID format (job_id should be a UUID)
// GET request: empty body for signature

request.description:
Check the status of an export job.

### Path Parameter
| Param | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `job_id` | UUID returned from the Create Export endpoint |

### Job Statuses
| Status | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `QUEUED` | Waiting in queue |
| `PROCESSING` | Currently generating file |
| `COMPLETED` | Ready for download |
| `FAILED` | Export failed |

When status is `COMPLETED`, the response includes a signed S3 download URL (valid for 1 hour).

item.name: 🧪 Webhook (Internal)
item.description:
Razorpay POS Webhook endpoint. This is called automatically by Razorpay — not by partners.

Included here for testing/debugging only.

request.description:
**For internal testing only.** Simulates a Razorpay POS webhook notification.

In production, this endpoint is called automatically by Razorpay when a POS transaction occurs.
